title: Cell culture
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"e2tlh","text":"Medium: DMEM/F-12, GlutaMAXTM (ThermoFisher Scientific) + 10% Fetal Bovine Serum (GibcoTM)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":27,"length":3},{"style":"sup","offset":87,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6gaug","text":"Trypsin-EDTA (0.25%) (ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eec91","text":"PBS, pH 7.4 (ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Culture human SH-SH5Y cells at 37 °C and 5% CO 2
Incubate cells with Trypsin-EDTA for 5 min at 37 °C and 5% CO 2
Add 9 mL medium to neutralise Trypsin-EDTA
Split at desired ratio into fresh medium
creator: Alexander Röntgen
